name: Olivia Wang
shortBio: Covers Guilin, Yangshuo, and Zhangjiajie with a focus on scenic pacing, weather windows, base choice, and low-friction outdoor days.
fullBio: Olivia Wang is the landscape and slow-travel editor at China Travel Notes. She leads Guilin, Yangshuo, and Zhangjiajie coverage, focusing on base choice, weather timing, scenic half days, and how to keep mountain-and-river destinations from becoming overly rushed or overly theatrical.
reviewProcess: Olivia reviews pages for weather fit, scenic payoff, travel fatigue, and whether an outdoor plan still feels realistic once transfers, queues, and energy levels are accounted for.
seoDescription: Read Guilin, Yangshuo, and Zhangjiajie travel guides by Olivia Wang at China Travel Notes.
